thread.title: SAM MKOKELI: Chairing the G20 is an opportunity to showcase SA Inc
thread.title_full: SAM MKOKELI: Chairing the G20 is an opportunity to showcase SA Inc

author: Sam Mkokeli
title: SAM MKOKELI: Chairing the G20 is an opportunity to showcase SA Inc
text:
Sam Mkokeli Columnist and contributor Opinion SAM MKOKELI: Chairing the G20 is an opportunity to showcase SA Inc The same energy as before the 2010 World Cup is needed to rally the country B L Premium 24 November 2024 - 07:37
Africa is experiencing something akin to the Year of the Locust as the people’s wrath pulls unresponsive governing parties from power.
Namibians go to the polls on Wednesday, and there is a strong chance they will do to the ruling Swapo what South Africans did to the ANC on May 7. Ghana follows on December 7, with a strong possibility the opposition could triumph...
